w:r.w:t: Technology You Can Trust / Technology You Control
Client Commitment & Support - “What TechVanta Labs Stands For”
Why TechVanta Labs / What Makes Us Stand Out

delivers intelligent, scalable digital solutions designed to transform the way businesses operate and grow. We specialize in custom software development, ERP, CRM, and LMS platforms, along with modern web and mobile applications tailored to your industry needs
Our expertise extends to enterprise, government, and financial domain projects, ensuring secure, high-performance solut
We also empower businesses through strategic digital marketing, e-commerce integration, and social media enablement
helping you enhance visibility, generate qual
With innovation, reliability, and customer-centric delivery at our core, we provide technology that strengthens your digital presence and keeps your business future-ready.

is a fast-growing technology solutions company delivering custom software, modern websites, mobile apps, and enterprise platforms like ERP, CRM, and LMS. Based in Bhopal and serving clients across India, we help businesses enhance efficiency, strengthen their digital presence, and accelerate growth with intelligent, future-ready solutions

is a dynamic and forward-thinking technology solutions company headquartered in Bhopal, proudly serving clients across India. We specialize in designing and developing custom software, mobile applications, modern websites, and enterprise-grade platforms
that align seamlessly with your business objectives

Our approach is rooted in innovation, technical excellence, and client-centricity. We work closely with each organization to understand its operational challenges and strategic goals, enabling us to craft tailored digital solutions that streamline processes, enhance productivity, and elevate brand presence.

With expertise spanning corporate enterprises, government domains, and financial institutions, we deliver secure, scalable, and industry-specific applications that drive measurable impact. From bespoke web and desktop solutions to advanced digital integrations, our focus remains on building technology that adapts to your

, every solution is engineered with precision, creativity, and a commitment to quality. We ensure our clients stay future-ready by providing digital experiences that improve performance today and create opportunities for tomorrow.

To empower businesses and public-sector organizations with intelligent, scalable, and purpose-built digital solutions that simplify complexity, enhance decision-making, and accelerate growth. We strive to transform everyday operations—whether through custom software, mobile apps, business analytics, or enterprise systems—into seamless, data-driven experiences that deliver measurable value and long-term impact.

To become a trusted technology partner recognized for redefining how organizations operate, engage, and evolve in a digital-first world. Our vision is to lead the industry in crafting integrated platforms—from CRM and ERP solutions to cloud and AI-driven tools—that elevate transparency, strengthen governance, and enable organizations of every scale to operate smarter, faster, and more efficiently.
Every solution we build is rooted in understanding the real challenges our clients face. We design technology that doesn’t just work—but works with intention, impact, and clarity.
Whether in workflows, communication, or data handling, we operate with complete transparency to deliver systems that enhance accountability and inspire confidence.
We embrace modern technologies—cloud, mobile, analytics, automation—but ensure they serve a real business function. Our innovation is thoughtful, not experimental.
With increasing digital risk, security is embedded into every architecture, workflow, and line of code. We protect what matters most—your data, operations, and reputation.
We measure success by the success of our clients. From onboarding to deployment and support, we commit to responsiveness, clarity, and long-term partnership.
Whether building an ERP for government operations or a mobile app for a growing business, we uphold rigorous quality standards to ensure reliability, performance, and scalability.
We believe the best solutions emerge through open collaboration—within our teams, with our clients, and with the communities we serve.
We understand that your software systems are critical to your business. Our solutions are crafted with your growth in mind
designed to support expansion while remaining reliable, scalable, and efficient.

We develop custom online software for small and growing companies, tailoring solutions to specific business requirements. In addition to development, we offer ongoing technical support to ensure smooth operation.
Our team consists exclusively of experienced professionals who benefit from ongoing training to stay
current with the latest technologies. This ensures that every project is handled with expertise and up-to-date practices.
We possess extensive experience managing complex projects of all kinds. That means you can trust us to deliver on time and within budget
Our process begins by gaining a deep understanding of your business needs. From there, we design and develop software crafted specifically for you
with clear budgeting and transparent planning.
Our Medicine Inventory Monitoring System (MeDio) streamlines inventory management for pharmacies and medicine stores, providing features such as:
track inventory levels and stock movements with ease
Seamless sale processing, including customer billing and balance tracking
Handling of sales returns and generation of receipts
generate daily and monthly sales reports to monitor performance
With MeDio, inventory control becomes streamlined and less error-prone, enabling better business oversight and decision-making

Our Financial Services CRM System is a unified platform designed to streamline lead management across insurance and investment products. It centralizes lead capture, assignment, tracking, and follow-up to ensure fast responses, improved coordination, and higher conversion rates.
Centralized lead intake with complete client & product details
Automated lead assignment based on expertise and rules
Full follow-up history with callbacks and status updates
Dashboards and quick search for real-time visibility
Secure, scalable system with reporting and audit trails
This CRM system enhances operational efficiency, strengthens customer engagement, and provides a reliable foundation for managing tele-calling and lead lifecycle activities

Our Integrated Government ERP System streamlines and digitizes administrative and citizen-service operations for government departments and public sector organizations. It provides a unified platform to automate workflows, enhance transparency, and improve coordination across all functional domains.
Centralized management of HR, Finance, Procurement, Legal, File Tracking, RTI, and other core functions
Automated workflows with role-based access, audit trails, and secure data handling
Real-time dashboards and reporting for improved visibility and faster decision-making
Seamless inter-departmental data exchange to reduce duplication and manual effort
Scalable, modular architecture aligned with government IT standards and compliance needs
This ERP system is designed to modernize governance, strengthen accountability, and deliver efficient, transparent, and technology-driven public administration.
We prioritize our clients and commit to:
We guarantee emergency support within one hour. A real person will handle your online chat or email, and we can often resolve issues remotely without waiting for an on-site technician.
Every technology recommendation is grounded in a clear understanding of your company’s business benefits.
We avoid “geek speak.” Our technicians explain issues in plain English or Hindi, so you always know what’s happening.
We aim for complete client satisfa

We deliver comprehensive services including software design, development, website creation, and digital marketing — all at competitive prices. We don’t just build websites; we provide full business-oriented solutions designed to generate leads and increase sales.
carefully aligned with your business goals and operational needs. Whether you are a startup or a growing enterprise, we build systems that help you manage processes efficiently and scale as you grow
We create modern, responsive websites tailored to your brand and business objectives. Our web development services emphasize usability, performance, and visual appeal
to ensure that your online presence reflects your corporate identity and engages your audience.
Recognizing the importance of mobility, we deliver custom mobile applications that serve your business needs
from user-facing apps to internal tools. Each app is designed with practicality, user experience, and long-term maintainabilit

Beyond software and apps, we offer graphic design and outdoor branding to support your brand identity across various media. Whether it’s designing promotional materials or branding physical spaces, we help you maintain a consistent and professional look
including social media and e-commerce integrations

to help you expand digital reach, attract new customers, and convert leads into sales. Our marketing services are crafted to complement the technical solutions we build, creating a unified digital growth strategy

We bring deep domain expertise across modern digital technologies that help organizations innovate, optimize operations, and scale effectively. Our solutions are built to empower businesses with stronger insights, enhanced security, and future-ready digital capabilities.

We transform raw data into meaningful insights through intuitive dashboards, visual analytics, and automated reporting. Our BI solutions enable data-driven decision-making, helping businesses track performance, identify trends, and uncover new opportunities for growth

We design and implement secure, scalable cloud environments tailored to your operational needs. From cloud migration and deployment to optimization and management, our cloud solutions enhance reliability, reduce infrastructure costs, and support seamless business expansion.

We strengthen your digital ecosystem with robust security frameworks that safeguard systems, data, and applications. Our cybersecurity services include threat prevention, risk assessment, compliance support, and ongoing monitoring to ensure uninterrupted and protected business operations.

We help organizations make smarter decisions through advanced analytics, predictive modeling, and data interpretation. Our analytics solutions offer clarity on customer behavior, operational efficiency, and market trends, empowering you to plan strategically and drive better outcomes.

We build high-quality mobile and web applications tailored to your business needs. Whether customer-facing or internal, our apps are designed for usability, performance, and scalability—delivering seamless digital experiences across all devices.
Why TechVanta Labs / What Makes Us Stand Out
Our staff are seasoned professionals who regularly update their skills to stay current with the latest technologies. This ensures every project is handled with expertise and contemporary practices
We don’t do “one-size-fits-all”; we take time to understand your business requirements, then build software tailored specifically to those needs
while keeping budgets and timelines realistic
Having handled complex projects before, we’re equipped to deliver on time and within budget, regardless of the project’s scale
We prioritize your satisfaction: whether through timely support, clear communication (in plain English or Hindi), or remote issue resolution

merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, special, punitive, or exemplary damages arising from your use of the Service.

(“we,” “our,” or “the Company”) is committed to protecting the privacy and security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, disclose, and safeguard information when you visit or interact with our website
By using the Service, you consent to the data practices described in this policy.
We may collect the following categories of information:
Name, email address, phone number, and organization details
Information submitted through contact forms, registration forms, surveys, or service inquiries
Any communication shared with us via email, chat, or other channels
IP address, browser type, device information, and operating system
Pages visited, time spent, clicks, and referring URLs
Search engines or keywords used to reach our website
These details help us analyze usage trends and improve service performance.
and similar technologies to enhance user experience, track preferences, and personalize content.
in their browser settings; however, some website features may not function smoothly.
Important: We do not use cookies to store sensitive personal information.
may use collected data for the following purposes:
To respond to inquiries, service requests, and support needs
To improve website functionality, user experience, and system performance
To personalize content and tailor communication
For marketing, product updates, service announcements, and promotional material
For statistical analysis, research, and business insights
To enhance security, monitor usage, and prevent fraudulent activity
We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information with third-party marketing organizations.
Product announcements and new feature releases
Important notifications regarding security or policy changes
at any time through the unsubscribe link provided in our
We may share personal data only under the following circumstances:
who support hosting, analytics, or security activities
We do not share personally identifiable information with third parties for unrelated commercial purposes.
Encryption of sensitive data during transmission
Role-based access controls within our organization
Regular system audits, security assessments, and monitoring
Secure server infrastructure and compliance-oriented practices
All employees handling personal information are required to maintain
and follow internal data protection guidelines.
Despite our efforts, no digital system is completely secure. Users share information at their own risk.
We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to:
Fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy
Meet legal, regulatory, or contractual obligations
Once data is no longer required, it is securely deleted or anonymized.
links to external platforms or partner websites.
TechVanta Labs does not control, endorse, or take responsibility for the privacy practices or content of third-party sites.
Users are encouraged to review the privacy policies of all external websites they visit.
Depending on applicable laws, users may have the right to:
Request access to their personal data
Withdraw consent for specific data uses
Restrict or object to certain processing activities
To exercise these rights, contact us at:
may update this Privacy Policy at any time.
Any changes will be posted on this page with the updated date.
Continued use of the Service after changes indicates acceptance of the updated policy.
For questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact:

, we are committed to delivering high-quality IT services, consulting solutions, and technology products with professionalism and transparency. This Cancellation & Refund Policy outlines the conditions under which cancellations or refunds may be requested.
By engaging with our products or services, you ag
ree to the terms outlined below
Cancellation requests must be submitted in writing to
and will be reviewed by our support team.
Cancellations will only be considered if requested within
hours of purchasing a product or service
, provided that execution or project initiation has not yet begun.
Once a product or service has been assigned to the execution/technical team, or the project has commenced, cancellation requests will not be accepted.
special pricing, promotional campaigns, seasonal offers, corporate discounts, or limited-time deals
Express, urgent, or same-day technical services and consulting sessions are non-cancellable.
determines that a requested digital solution is
A partial refund may be issued
Due to the nature of software development, IT services, consulting engagements, cloud-based solutions, and digital transformation initiatives,
TechVanta Labs does not offer refunds once payment is made
, except as outlined in this policy.
If a cancellation request is approved within the
credited towards future services for up to
issued for the following types of products/services:
IT consulting or technical advisory services
AMC, managed IT support, or maintenance contracts
Digital marketing, SEO, or social media management
Configuration or setup of third-party tools or platforms
Refunds will not be provided for changes in client requirements, project delays caused by the
client, or shift in internal business priorities.
For digital marketing and SEO services:
Due to the nature of search algorithms,
no ranking/traffic/sales guarantees can be provided
By proceeding with the next payment cycle,
the client confirms satisfaction with services delivered to date
All payments for SEO/digital marketing are
If you believe the delivered product or service does not match documented requirements or agreed specifications, you must notify us
Refunds will not be granted based on subjective dissatisfaction or changes in expectations after delivery.
for delays, deficiencies, or failures caused by third-party vendors such as:
with third parties requested by the client will be billed at our
If a client chooses to terminate a project midway:
No refunds will be issued for completed milestones or ongoing work
All completed deliverables will be provided upon settlement of outstanding invoices
Additional effort up to the termination date will be billable
reserves the right to suspend or terminate a product or service if:
The client fails to provide required inputs or approvals
There is misconduct, abusive communication, or ethical breach
Payments already made will not be refunded
may apply for work completed up to the termination point
without prior discussion is considered a violation of this policy.
In such cases, TechVanta Labs may:
Withhold source code, deliverables, or documentation
Initiate legal action to recover dues, including penalties
For cancellation or refund inquiries, contact:

, we are committed to empowering businesses with intelligent, scalable, and user-focused digital solutions. From custom software and mobile applications to modern websites and digital marketing, every solution we create is driven by a deep understanding of your business goals. Our experienced team blends technical expertise with innovative thinking to deliver reliable, future-ready systems that help you streamline operations, strengthen your brand, and accelerate growth
Backed by transparent communication, dedicated support, and a client-first approach, we stand beside you at every step of your digital transformation journey.
TechVanta Labs - building technology that grows with your business.
